name: Suspicious program initiating DNS query (Windows)
notes:
This rule triggers when a program that is not referenced as legitimate is initiating a DNS query.

Note: The DNS Application Allowlist reference set must be populated with applications allowed to generate DNS queries
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following Application.DNS In Progress
when any of Process Name (custom) are contained in any of DNS Application Allowlist - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
TD_list: APPLY Suspicious program initiating DNS query (Windows) on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Application.DNS In Progress
AND when any of Process Name (custom) are contained in any of DNS Application Allowlist - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
RED_list: Event name: Suspicious program initiating DNS query (Windows)
Event description: Detects when a program that is not referenced as legitimate initiated a DNS query.
